description:
## Release (2026-03-15)

* ember-estree 0.1.0 (minor)

#### :rocket: Enhancement
* `ember-estree`
  * [#3](https://github.com/NullVoxPopuli/ember-estree/pull/3) Add print/parse exports, Glimmer→ESTree transforms, CI workflow, replace prettier with oxfmt/oxlint, swap jscodeshift examples for zmod ([@Copilot](https://github.com/apps/copilot-swe-agent))

#### :house: Internal
* `ember-estree`
  * [#6](https://github.com/NullVoxPopuli/ember-estree/pull/6) Add publint to lint script and configure package files ([@Copilot](https://github.com/apps/copilot-swe-agent))
  * [#5](https://github.com/NullVoxPopuli/ember-estree/pull/5) Update keywords and author in package.json ([@NullVoxPopuli](https://github.com/NullVoxPopuli))
  * [#2](https://github.com/NullVoxPopuli/ember-estree/pull/2) Add release-plan ([@NullVoxPopuli](https://github.com/NullVoxPopuli))

#### Committers: 2
- Copilot [Bot] ([@copilot-swe-agent](https://github.com/apps/copilot-swe-agent))
- [@NullVoxPopuli](https://github.com/NullVoxPopuli)
